title: Wholesome Kenyan Egg Hash
description: A quick, malty hash that marries free‑range eggs with sweet potato, tomato and spinach, finished with a dash of smoked paprika for a dash‑friendly flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced onions and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the diced sweet potato and cook until just tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes and cook for 2 minutes until they start to break down.
Fold in the chopped spinach and cook until wilted, about 1 minute.
Whisk the eggs in a bowl, then pour them evenly over the vegetables in the skillet.
Season with smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook, stirring gently, until the eggs are set, about 3 minutes.
Sprinkle fresh coriander and grated cheese on top, serve hot, and enjoy the malty, chewy Kenyan egg hash.
